name: HEX_UPGRADE_SCHEDULE_HISTORY
description: The table stores the history of runs for all schedules.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the unique sequence generated value.

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the reference from the table HEX_PROCESS_METADATA.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the reference from the table HEX_SCHEDULE_METADATA.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the start time for the request.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the end time for the request.

columns.Name: NEXT_SCHEDULE_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the next upcoming schedule date.

columns.Name: PROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: The column indicates the status of the process.

columns.Name: PARENT_REQ_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the initial request id which has triggered the schedule.

columns.Name: SPECIAL_STATUS_FLAG
columns.Comments: The column indicates if the current run is initial/latest run.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_RUN_RELEASE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the last run release for the schedule.
